summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Lillith Offline application. All major features working correctly including Character Builder auto-fill with LM Studio fallback, Services Console start/stop all functionality, menu bar navigation, and troubleshooting panel.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 521 (server down) instead of expected 502 when LM Studio offline
minor_issues.impact: Expected behavior - LM Studio unreachable from container environment
minor_issues.note: This is expected as per agent context - LM Studio at http://100.77.24.8:1234 is unreachable from container

passed_tests: Projects CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Character autofill with fallback when LM Studio offline
Services API endpoints (list, update, individual start/stop)
Menu bar rendering and dropdown functionality
Menu bar navigation to Services page
Character Builder auto-fill with fallback behavior
Services Console UI with start/stop all buttons
